summary: p10 complete. 6/6 goals MET. v0.10.0 released. wasmtime 26→46 migration required five trait API changes and a rust-toolchain bump. Post-release RUSTSEC-2026-0204 (crossbeam-epoch) resolved via Cargo.lock update. k6 thresholds are aspirational — need a live staging run. Recommended next: p11-api-stability (A2UI/Kiln API freeze, SDK v1.0 alignment, k6 baselines, entrypoint secrets, STAGING_SMOKE_TOKEN rotation).
